2403300.name: Train Simulator: E412 Electric Locomotive
2403300.description:
Pro Range


The Pro Range is aimed toward the serious train simulation enthusiast looking for a complex machine to master. Each product is designed to provide education and entertainment for users. Xbox controller and HUD interface support do not come as standard and users will need to read the accompanying documentation to fully understand the operation of this advanced simulation

Take the controls of the E.412 ‘Brennerlok’, a powerful multi-system electric locomotive from RSSLO.

Built for the northern Italian lines of the Brenner Pass, the E.412 was designed to be used on the longest and steepest grades for crossing mountains. A total of 28 units were acquired by Trenitalia to unify rail networks between Italy, Switzerland, Austria and Germany. More than suited to this task the E.412 is one of the most powerful electric locomotives in Italy featuring three-phase asynchronous traction motors.

Recreated in detail here for Train Simulator Classic with the XMPR colour scheme and realistic cab controls, this locomotive includes three scenarios for the picturesque Tirol route. On which you will be challenged to run freight along the line from Brenner in Italy crossing the border to Kufstein in Austria.

Add this innovative 90’s electric locomotive to your Train Simulator collection. The E.412 ‘Brennerlok’ is ready for service.

Included Scenarios


The E412 Electric Locomotive Loco Add-On includes 3 career scenarios for the Tirol route:

  • E412 Wood for Brenner
  • E412 Brenner morning
  • E412 Loco train

More scenarios are available on the Steam Workshop online and in-game. Train Simulator’s Steam Workshop scenarios are free and easy to download, adding many more hours of exciting gameplay. With scenarios being added daily, why don’t you check it out now!

Key Features


  • Highly detailed model of the E.412 Electric Locomotive
  • Authentic driver's cab with realistic controls
  • Includes SIFA and PZB safety systems
  • Controls for cab doors, windows, wipers, headlights and more.
  • Three career scenarios for Tirol
  • Quick Drive compatible
  • Download size: 33 MB
